productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Grey Tshirt
description: Composition Grey and black striped t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has full black sleeves with grey ribbed cuffs, round ribbed neckline, buttoned chest placket, tape detailing in black on the sides, branding embroidered on the back of the neck, branding appliqué d on the chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring, tumble dry, scrub or dry clean Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Take sophisticated dressing to the next level with this round neck t-shirt from united colors of benetton. The stripes gives this tee a burst of energy, the United Naval appliqué adds to your masculine appeal, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Pair this tee with denims and sneakers Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
